author: cms-sw
body:
SCRAMV3 now supports to generate multiple unit tests using single command. The formatto define multiple tests is
```
<test name="FOO${loop}" command="echo Foo ${loop}" loop="start,stop,step"/>
```
e.g.
- To run 5 test FOO1, FOO2,..., FOO5
```
<test name="FOO${loop}" command="echo Foo ${loop}" loop="5"/>
```

- To run 5 test FOO5, FOO6,..., FOO10 
```
<test name="FOO${loop}" command="echo Foo ${loop}" loop="5,10"/>
```

- To run FOO0, FOO5, FOO10,..., FOO100
```
<test name="FOO${loop}" command="echo Running Foo${loop} for item number ${loop}" loop="0,100,5"/>
```
title: [SCRAM] Update to support generating multiple tests using single command
